title: Number Range Helpers: Clamp, Wrap, and Remap
description: Provides utilities to constrain, wrap, and re-map numbers within a range.
explanation: These helpers solve common numeric range problems: clamping prevents values from exceeding limits, wrapping keeps values cyclical within a range, and remapping converts values between different scales. They’re useful in UI animations, game development, and data visualization where normalized or constrained values are needed.
